Service Delivery Flow

Service Payment Flow.

01

Customer Request

Customer submits service details, travel dates, quantity, destination, or case requirements.

02

Supplier Check

Supplier availability, service scope, delivery timing, and price are confirmed.

03

Invoice Issued

An itemized invoice shows supplier cost, agency fee, terms, and refund conditions.

04

Approval & Payment

Customer approves the invoice and pays through a secure hosted checkout or approved payment link.

05

Service Processing

Booking, supplier work, transport arrangement, tour coordination, or goods dispatch begins.

06

Delivery & Receipt

Customer receives confirmation, receipt, booking proof, delivery proof, or service completion record.

Invoice conditions

Payment is requested only after invoice review. Supplier booking or service work proceeds after payment approval. Live card details must be entered only on the approved payment gateway.

Notify Admin via WhatsApp

Pay Now

VISA Mastercard

Payment form preview only. In live operation, card data must be entered on the approved payment provider page or secure iframe, with 3DS authentication enabled where required.

No payment is collected from this form. Payment is requested only after invoice approval; supplier booking or service work proceeds after Visa or Mastercard payment is approved.

Policy Summary

Clear invoice, refund, privacy, and payment terms before checkout.

Payment is requested only after service details and invoice review. Customer information is used for booking coordination, invoice records, and legitimate compliance review.

Payment Security

Real card payment must be completed through an approved hosted checkout or secure iframe. RTP Connect does not store full card number, expiry, or CVC.

Refund & Cancellation

Refund eligibility depends on supplier rules, cancellation timing, and the approved invoice terms shown before payment.

Service Delivery

Supplier booking, transport, tour, or business coordination begins only after invoice approval and successful payment confirmation.

Customer Records

Booking request, invoice approval, receipt, and service delivery notes are retained for customer support, dispute review, and compliance checks.

Company Information

RTP Connect is presented with registered company support for travel agency activity.

RTP Connect is operated for booking coordination, travel support, transport arrangements, business service coordination, and invoice-based customer payment handling under the registered company profile below.

Registered Company

PRATHNA KASEKOR KHMER IMPORT EXPORT CO., LTD.

Legal Form

Private Limited Company, incorporated in Cambodia on 19 May 2025.

Registered Activity

Main business activity recorded as Travel Agency for tax registration review.

Tax Registration

Registered with the General Department of Taxation from 20 May 2025. Full certificates are available for bank or payment processor review.

Production Platform Roadmap

Built first as a public request and invoice flow, then prepared for secure backend payment integration.

The current website is the public entry point. The production platform should add customer dashboard, admin dashboard, quotation management, supplier records, payment webhooks, audit logs, and protected backend verification before any live booking is confirmed.

Customer Area

Requests, quotations, bookings, payments, invoices, receipts, messages, and profile records.

Admin Area

Customer requests, supplier checks, quotations, bookings, payments, refunds, reports, audit log, and settings.

Booking Status

Draft, submitted, under review, quotation sent, awaiting payment, verified, confirmed, in progress, completed, cancelled, or refunded.

Payment Verification

Live payments must be confirmed by bank callback/webhook and backend verification before booking confirmation or service release.

Contact

RTP Connect support is available for booking and invoice review.

For customer support, use the booking request form and WhatsApp notification flow after invoice review.

RTP Connect Travel | Business | Investment. Operated with registered company support, itemized invoices, secure checkout readiness, and AML/KYC procedures.
